steps.title: Collect the x terms
steps.content:
Expand and move the $x$ terms to one side.
$$x(r-8)+5=21x+29$$
$$x(r-8)-21x=24$$
$$x(r-29)=24$$

steps.title: Find the excluded value
steps.content: The equation has exactly one solution as long as the coefficient of $x$ is not $0$. If $r=29$, the equation becomes $$0x=24$$ which has no solution, not exactly one solution. The answer is D.
